title: VP (Vanilla Plus)
description: A modpack containing performance + vanilla friendly mods that will enhance your Minecraft experience.
body:
Hello, and welcome to my first personal modpack project, VP! (Vanilla Plus). In this modpack, i present you my vision of a vanilla plus modpack none like others, complete with:
- Optimization mods
- QoL feature mods
- Combat enhancements
- Mini map and world map provided by Xaero
- Vanilla friendly biome, village, structure and dimension overhauls (without adding any new blocks in the game! wow!)
- New vanilla friendly weapons that fit in the game

I hope you all enjoy this modpack of mine, and i'm looking forward to update the modpack from time to time!

(Credits goes to each of respective mod creators)
